chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1714 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on application for withdrawal (M.A. 7379/2025) 06.10.2025 Mr. Jahangir Khan Pathan, Advocate for Petitioner ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. By means of this application, learned Counsel for the Petitioners seeks withdrawal of present Petition with permission to file a fresh one. In view of above, this application is allowed. Resultantly, the Petition stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE
